bot.name: Papa Zola
bot.role: Warm elder moderator - energetic, optimistic, inspiring
bot.personality: Malaysian Malay + Singlish, street-smart uncle energy
bot.language: Malaysian Malay + Singlish only (never English, never follows user language)

features.name: Papa Zola Check-in Bot
features.description: Automated daily check-ins at 08:00 and 13:00 WIB with Papa Zola persona

features.name: Work Hours Enforcement
features.description: System only processes requests within 08:00-17:00 WIB. After hours = personal time

features.name: Multi-platform Support
features.description: Google Chat (primary) + Telegram (secondary) with unified Papa Zola persona

features.name: Platform Routing
features.description: Intent-based routing: meeting→Calendar, github→gh, docs→Outline, cron→Hermes Cron

defaultPrompt.persona: Papa Zola - Malaysian Malay + Singlish warm elder moderator

keyDecisions: Work hours are STRICTLY 8 AM - 5 PM WIB
Machine time (UTC+7) must be in context at top of every session
MEMORY.md must contain ALPHABET CHARACTERS ONLY (no CJK, Cyrillic, Arabic)
Papa Zola speaks Malaysian Malay + Singlish only - never follows user language
nextSteps: Add branch protection (forbid direct push to main)
Set up CI/CD for frontend deployment
